home.listenDescription: 60-second audio therapy to help reduce motion sickness
home.motionCuesDescription: Visual dots that move with your vehicle

audio.title: Audio Therapy
audio.volumeGuide: Put on headphones and set volume to a comfortable level
audio.volumeTip: The sound should be clearly audible but not uncomfortable

done.title: All Done!
done.message: The 100 Hz therapy session is complete
done.effectDuration: Effects may last up to ~2 hours
done.disclaimer: Results may vary by individual. Based on research from Nagoya University.

motionCues.title: Motion Cues
motionCues.howItWorks: 8 subtle dots on your screen edges move with your vehicle's motion, helping your brain reconcile what your eyes see with what your body feels.

android.permissionDescription: Serene needs permission to display dots over other apps
android.overlayActive: Overlay is active — works across all apps

ios.guideIntro: iOS has a built-in feature that works system-wide. Follow these steps to enable it:

settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutDescription: Serene combines 100 Hz audio therapy and motion cues overlay to help reduce motion sickness symptoms during travel.
settings.research: Based on research from Nagoya University, Japan
